# Output Templates

## 1) Concise Evidence Answer
Use when user asks a direct question.

- Clinical question
- Short answer
- Key supporting evidence (2-5 bullets)
- Sources

## 2) Diagnosis/Workup Summary
Use when user asks for diagnostic approach or baseline workup.

- Patient context (if provided)
- Recommended diagnostic/workup elements
- Conditional branches (if any)
- Relevant contraindications or caveats
- Sources (sections + tables/flowcharts)

## 3) Treatment Comparison Table
Use when user asks to compare options.

Columns:
- Clinical scenario
- Option
- Eligibility/trigger
- Evidence summary
- Source

## 4) Decision Workflow Summary
Use when table/flowchart content is central.

- Start condition
- Branch criteria
- Recommended actions per branch
- Monitoring/follow-up points
- Sources (flowchart + supporting section narrative)

## 5) Evidence Gaps
Include when data is missing or ambiguous.

- What was searched
- What was not found
- Closest available evidence
- Clarification needed (if required)
